name: Credit Repair Plus
description_short: Credit Repair Plus disputes inaccurate items on credit reports and connects clients with lending partners for loan approval. They operate primarily in the NYC area with a free consultation model.
description_long:
Credit Repair Plus is a credit repair company operating under the brand name associated with savemycreditreport.com, serving customers primarily in the New York area including NYC, Brooklyn, Staten Island, and Manhattan. The company markets itself as an expert in credit repair and loan approval assistance, positioning credit restoration as the foundation for accessing better financial products and opportunities.

The company's core service involves disputing inaccurate and derogatory items on credit reports by leveraging consumer rights to engage credit bureaus and creditors. They handle collections accounts, repossessions, late payments, judgments, tax liens, and hard inquiries. Their process includes a free credit report evaluation across all three bureaus (TransUnion, Experian, Equifax), customized repair plan development aligned with FCRA, HIPAA, and FCBA compliance, and ongoing monitoring through a client portal where customers can track progress. They also offer buying assistance through lending partners for home and auto purchases.

The company differentiates itself through promised direct customer engagement with specialists, online progress tracking via client portal, access to credit education programs and webinars, and a structured 30-45 day initial correspondence timeline. Testimonials highlight debt settlement assistance with collection agencies alongside credit repair, and specific approval outcomes (credit card approval, loan approvals after prior denials).

However, significant limitations exist: the website lacks transparent pricing, clear timelines for results, specific success rate data, or detailed information about the lending partners referenced. The blog section contains only placeholder content ('Lorem Ipsum'), and the company's physical presence appears limited to the single phone number listed. No information is provided about credentials, licensing, or specific guarantees about outcome timelines.

In the broader ecosystem of credit repair services, consumers have multiple paths to improving their credit. Professional credit repair companies can dispute inaccurate items with all three bureaus, while credit monitoring services provide ongoing alerts about changes to your reports. For those building credit from scratch, secured credit cards and credit builder loans offer structured approaches. Consumers dealing with overwhelming debt may benefit from debt consolidation loans to simplify payments, or credit counseling through nonprofit agencies for personalized budgeting guidance. Consumers who successfully repair their credit often find better rates on installment loans, secured credit cards, and other financial products.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Free initial credit report evaluation and consultation
Comprehensive three-bureau credit report review (TransUnion, Experian, Equifax)
Online client portal with real-time progress tracking and PIN-protected access
Explicitly states compliance with FCRA, HIPAA, FCBA and other consumer protection laws
Offers both credit repair and debt settlement assistance with collection agencies
Includes lending partner network for home and auto purchase assistance post-repair
Credit education programs and webinars available to clients
cons: No pricing information disclosed on website; cost structure completely opaque
No published success rates, average timelines for removal, or specific performance guarantees
Limited geographic footprint (primarily NYC-area based on marketing language)
Blog/education content incomplete (placeholder Lorem Ipsum text suggests outdated or abandoned sections)
No information about company credentials, licensing, staff qualifications, or regulatory oversight details
best_for: NYC-area residents with collections accounts, late payments, or judgments on their credit reports
Consumers planning to apply for mortgages or auto loans who need to improve credit first
People who want hands-off credit dispute handling with online progress tracking capability
diagnosis: Credit Repair Plus is best for NYC-area consumers with negative items on their credit reports who want structured dispute assistance combined with eventual lending support. The main caveat is the complete lack of transparent pricing, published success rates, or verifiable timelines—typical industry red flags that require direct phone contact (718-475-2087) before committing.
services: Free credit report evaluation and line-by-line review
Credit report pulls from TransUnion, Experian, and Equifax
Dispute filing with credit bureaus and creditors
Debt settlement negotiation with collection agencies
Online client portal with progress tracking
Lending partner matching for home/auto purchases
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
